name: PRIZE ANIMALS
short_description: "PRIZE ANIMALS" is a casual action game in which players collect cute animals with a crane. You can hook the crane's claws into the ring, or go for the antlers and tails. Would you like to collect over 50 different animals in a way that only you can?
detailed_description:
"PRIZE ANIMALS" is a casual action game in which players collect cute animals with a crane. You can hook the crane's claws into the ring, or go for the antlers and tails. Would you like to collect over 50 different animals in a way that only you can?

Animals around the world

More than 50 different animals appear.

Animals from disparate habitats will be brought together.

No worries for beginners

The number of plays is unlimited, so you can try as many times as you like.

Animals have rings attached to them, so if you have trouble getting them, you can aim for them.

Library mode

The library records the number of animals you have collected so far.

Cute animals can be viewed from various angles.
